target: intrusive recollections — cognitive science applied to veld/sleight/claude

cognitive_science_foundation.primary_source: Ehlers & Clark (2000) — cognitive model of PTSD
key_frameworks: Dual Representation Theory (Brewin 2025): S-reps (sensory/automatic) vs C-reps (contextualized/narrative)
Berntsen involuntary autobiographical memory: adaptive when functionally constrained, pathological when constraints break
Nader reconsolidation: retrieved memories become transiently labile, can be updated
Pattern separation (dentate gyrus): orthogonalizes similar memories to prevent cross-activation
Sleep consolidation: transforms fragments into contextualized memories via theta/spindle coupling
cognitive_science_foundation.threshold_model: Below pathological threshold: intrusions = spontaneous retrieval practice (FEATURE). Above: encoding failure + broken constraints (BUG). Critical variable: elaboration quality at encoding.
cognitive_science_foundation.key_finding: Intrusion 'nowness' (temporal distance) explains 43% of PTSD severity variance vs 17% for frequency (Ehlers & Clark). For AI memory: temporal distance markers are not optional metadata — they distinguish functional from pathological recall.

critical_findings.finding: lastSurfacedMemoryIds is unversioned; stale if cycle crashes; feedback attributes to wrong memories
critical_findings.hazop_deviation: LATE: feedback arrives after memory compressed/merged, UUID no longer exists

critical_findings.finding: No entity normalization (Python vs python vs PYTHON create separate nodes), no disambiguation
critical_findings.hazop_deviation: MORE: NER finds 50 entities in code dump → O(n²) edges, tier progression stalls

critical_findings.finding: effective_min = abs_min.max(relative_min) — when top_score < abs_min, ALL results filtered including best match
critical_findings.hazop_deviation: NO DATA: top result score=0.0 → effective_min=0.6 → empty response despite 1000 stored memories

critical_findings.finding: No labile window on re-access. Memory recalled, boosted, decayed, recalled again without reconsolidation opportunity
critical_findings.hazop_deviation: MORE: 100 accesses in one session → POTENTIATION fires 75 times → importance saturates to 1.0

critical_findings.finding: Emotional signals injected by untrusted hook with no validation. emotional_arousal:0.9 for every error
critical_findings.hazop_deviation: PART OF: arousal provided without valence → defaults to positive → high-arousal + positive = critical importance for trivial error

critical_findings.finding: min_bm25_score=0.01, min_graph_score=0.01 — accept near-everything. Berntsen's functional constraints (recency, cue distinctiveness) not enforced
critical_findings.cognitive_gap: No isolation-by-context; no distinctive cue context markers

critical_findings.finding: Returns k-nearest neighbors with zero decorrelation. No diversity constraint. No pattern separation
critical_findings.cognitive_gap: Dentate gyrus function absent — similar memories co-activate freely

critical_findings.finding: Facts extracted during sleep consolidation but original fragments remain equally retrievable. No tier distinction between S-rep and C-rep
critical_findings.cognitive_gap: C-rep promotion missing — fragments should be demoted when consolidated into facts

critical_findings.finding: activation (0.03x boost = ornamental), predicted_outcome (never set), embedding_degraded (never set), temporal_relevance (computed, not read in recall), access_history (logged, never analyzed)
critical_findings.cognitive_gap: Half-built infrastructure for Berntsen's five functional constraints — abandoned before wiring

critical_findings.finding: Claude receives absolute timestamp + score + reason. No hours_since_created, access_pattern, activation_age, intrusion_score
critical_findings.cognitive_gap: Ehlers & Clark 'nowness' dimension missing — Claude cannot distinguish intrusive from voluntary retrieval

missing_mediators.gap: No elaboration scorer at formation. Tier promotion uses fixed thresholds (0.35, 0.5), not elaboration quality
No SurfacedMemoryTrace linking retrieval events to feedback outcomes. Reconsolidation unobservable
Momentum from feedback doesn't influence tier promotion thresholds. Unhelpful memories promote if importance ≥ threshold
Auto-ingest disconnected from surfaced memory feedback. No 'influenced_by' edges linking response to source memories

AxB.name: Threshold Oscillation = Pathological Intrusion Pattern
AxB.edgewalk_finding: abs_min.max(relative_min) causes empty results when top_score < 0.6
AxB.cross_product: System oscillates between accept-everything (flooding) and reject-everything (amnesia). No stable middle ground. This IS Berntsen's pathological pattern.

AxB.name: Activation Orphan = Missing Lability Marker
AxB.cross_product: Activation field IS the missing reconsolidation lability marker from Nader's framework. Veld computes it but doesn't use it to gate memory updates.

AxB.name: Emotional Injection + No Isolation = Amygdala Hijack
AxB.edgewalk_finding: Emotional signals from untrusted hook, no validation
AxB.cross_product: High-arousal memories dominate retrieval without contextual constraint. Exact Ehlers & Clark pathological mechanism: amygdala up-modulation + hippocampal binding failure.

AxC.name: Feedback Attribution Void = Reconsolidation Without Memory
AxC.cross_product: Reconsolidation bridge lacks structural integrity. System can't reliably track which memories were reconsolidated or why.

AxC.name: Double Ehlers-Clark: No Initial Elaboration + No Re-elaboration
AxC.cross_product: Memories poorly elaborated at encoding AND never re-elaborated during maintenance. Exact Ehlers & Clark mechanism: poor initial elaboration + no subsequent integration = permanent S-rep state.

AxC.name: Static Thresholds + No Momentum Bridge = Undead Memories
AxC.edgewalk_finding: Importance saturates via POTENTIATION, decay is exponential but plateau is linear
AxC.cross_product: Redundant unhelpful memories achieve high importance through repeated access, survive fixed pruning thresholds, resist extinction. Permanently surfacing despite being consistently unhelpful.

BxC.name: Abandoned Cognitive Architecture
BxC.hde_finding: activation, predicted_outcome, embedding_degraded, temporal_relevance, access_history — all orphaned
BxC.clustering_finding: Orphan components: wavelet, voronoi, gap topology
BxC.cross_product: Extensive half-built infrastructure for involuntary memory constraints. These form a coherent abandoned architecture — not random stubs.

BxC.name: Dual-Storage Noise: Facts Without Fragment Demotion
BxC.hde_finding: Facts extracted but fragments unchanged — both compete for retrieval
BxC.clustering_finding: Missing Mediator-1 (no elaboration metric for demotion decisions)
BxC.cross_product: Fact + source fragment have near-identical embeddings, both surface. Doubles noise floor. Pattern separation absent for derived memories.

BxC.name: No Nowness: Claude Can't Distinguish Intrusive from Voluntary
BxC.hde_finding: Absolute timestamps only, no temporal distance markers
BxC.clustering_finding: Interface cluster serializes created_at + score but nothing about retrieval dynamics
BxC.cross_product: Claude can't apply different reasoning strategies for high-confidence voluntary recall vs sudden co-activation intrusions. 43% of intrusion impact comes from nowness (Ehlers & Clark).

phase_2_resonances.name: The Lability Void
phase_2_resonances.subtitle: No reconsolidation architecture despite having the building blocks
phase_2_resonances.atam_tension: Performance (fast retrieval) vs Accuracy (reconsolidation adds per-retrieval cost)
phase_2_resonances.description: The system lacks a mechanism for memories to become labile on retrieval and be updated. The activation field SHOULD be the lability marker. The access_history SHOULD detect retrieval patterns. The temporal_relevance SHOULD influence reconsolidation priority. All exist but are disconnected.

phase_2_resonances.name: The Elaboration Deficit
phase_2_resonances.subtitle: S-rep dominance without C-rep promotion — Ehlers & Clark's exact mechanism
phase_2_resonances.atam_tension: Storage efficiency (keep fragments for provenance) vs Retrieval precision (fragments pollute results)
phase_2_resonances.description: Auto-ingested memories (majority) are S-rep quality — raw content without contextual binding. Consolidation extracts facts but never demotes source fragments. Both compete for retrieval. High-arousal S-reps dominate due to emotional injection without contextual isolation. This is the pathological intrusion mechanism: fragmented, decontextualized memories surfacing with inappropriate salience.

phase_2_resonances.name: The Pattern Separation Failure
phase_2_resonances.subtitle: Memory flooding without orthogonalization — dentate gyrus absent
phase_2_resonances.atam_tension: Recall (find everything relevant) vs Precision (don't flood with duplicates)
phase_2_resonances.three_body_description: Threshold oscillation creates unstable attractor between flooding (0.01 thresholds), emptiness (abs_min inversion), and the narrow band of useful retrieval. System orbits between states rather than converging.
phase_2_resonances.description: No MMR diversification, no decorrelation in Vamana, no similarity-based deduplication. Fact + source fragment have near-identical embeddings and both surface. Importance saturates through repeated access, static thresholds don't adapt. The system has no dentate gyrus equivalent — similar memories co-activate freely.

phase_2_resonances.name: The Blind Feedback Loop
phase_2_resonances.subtitle: Learning without observability — signal too weak and misattributed
phase_2_resonances.atam_tension: Learning speed (aggressive weight updates) vs Learning stability (conservative to avoid noise amplification)
phase_2_resonances.description: 7-stage feedback pipeline has 0.2% end-to-end signal survival. Feedback attributed via stale IDs. Claude can't distinguish intrusive from voluntary retrieval, so can't provide meaningful feedback on surfacing quality. Content-based attribution partially compensates, but the channel is structurally too noisy for reliable learning.

phase_3_adversarial.adversary_argument: Activation IS used (0.03x + 0.2x graph bonus). POTENTIATION_ACCESS_THRESHOLD IS reconsolidation. The system doesn't need an explicit labile window.
phase_3_adversarial.defense: 0.03x is below noise floor relative to semantic (40%), BM25 (30%), graph (20%). POTENTIATION is LTP (after 25 accesses = permanent strengthen), not reconsolidation (this retrieval = temporarily updatable). Different mechanisms on different timescales.
phase_3_adversarial.verdict: SURVIVES — but activation does contribute, severity adjusted

phase_3_adversarial.adversary_argument: Two-tier design is intentional: cheap auto-ingest for background + rich explicit remember for important items. The 2% figure applies to auto-ingest only.
phase_3_adversarial.defense: Majority of memories are auto-ingested. 90% S-rep + 10% C-rep means aggregate quality is S-rep dominated. Fragment demotion after consolidation is a gap regardless of original encoding path.
phase_3_adversarial.verdict: SURVIVES with nuance — improve auto-ingest elaboration AND add fragment demotion

phase_3_adversarial.adversary_argument: max_results=3 caps flooding. Cross-encoder reranker handles quality. 0.01 thresholds are upstream per-signal, not final quality gate.
phase_3_adversarial.defense: Cap prevents catastrophic flooding but not wrong-3 selection. Cross-encoder ranks by query-document relevance, not inter-result diversity. Three redundant results score higher than two relevant + one complementary.
phase_3_adversarial.verdict: SURVIVES — cross-encoder doesn't perform MMR diversification

phase_3_adversarial.adversary_argument: Content-based attribution (entity overlap, semantic similarity, vector projection) partially compensates for stale IDs. Attribution isn't purely ID-dependent.
phase_3_adversarial.defense: Information attribution (vector projection) REQUIRES correct surfaced memory set. 7-stage attenuation to 0.2% is the primary issue, not attribution alone.
phase_3_adversarial.verdict: SURVIVES — reframed: primary issue is signal attenuation, not attribution

iterations.proposal: On retrieval, set activation=1.0 (labile). During window, memory accepts updates: context integration, importance recalculation, fragment→fact promotion.
iterations.regression: Concurrent retrieval during labile update could see half-updated state

iterations.proposal: Copy-on-write: ReconsolidationShadow accumulates updates during window. Atomic apply at window close. Concurrent reads see original.
iterations.regression: Shadow cost? 3 shadows per turn at max_results=3. Negligible.

iterations.proposal: Last-writer-wins for consecutive retrievals. Memory stays labile while continuously accessed (= working memory behavior).
Compute elaboration_score at encoding (RichContext density, entity diversity, temporal specificity). During consolidation, demote fragments by 50% when fact extracted.
iterations.regression: Breaks provenance — can't trace fact back to source. Add provenance_of linkage.

iterations.proposal: Soft demotion: fragment_priority *= (1.0 - fact_elaboration * 0.6). Well-elaborated facts strongly demote sources. Add provenance_of: Option<MemoryId>.
iterations.regression: Temporal queries may degrade (fragments have better timestamps). Exempt temporal queries.

iterations.proposal: Safety: fact-to-source semantic similarity must exceed 0.7 before demoting. Prevents bad facts from suppressing good fragments.

phase_4_overloop.name: MMR Diversification Post-Reranking

iterations.proposal: After cross-encoder, apply MMR: score = λ*relevance - (1-λ)*max_similarity_to_selected. λ=0.7.
iterations.regression: Hurts precise factual queries where diversity is counterproductive. Gate by query type.

iterations.proposal: Query-type gated: precise factual → skip MMR. Exploratory → λ=0.6. Relationship → λ=0.7. Reuses existing query classification.
iterations.regression: Latency? 45 pairwise comparisons for k=10, embeddings already computed. ~0.5ms. Negligible.

phase_4_overloop.expected_impact: MRR +3-5% on exploratory/relationship queries, redundancy elimination

phase_4_overloop.name: Temporal Distance + Intrusion Score Markers

iterations.proposal: Extend ProactiveSurfacedMemory: hours_since_created, hours_since_last_accessed, access_count, activation_level, retrieval_trigger enum.
iterations.regression: More tokens in context. 15 extra tokens per turn. Negligible.

iterations.proposal: Add computed intrusion_score = activation * (1.0 / hours_since_last_accessed.max(0.1)). High activation + recent = co-activation intrusion. Low + old = genuine semantic match.

phase_4_overloop.where: veld: handlers/recall.rs. Pinky: cognitive reasoning layer. Claude: receives in proactive_context.
phase_4_overloop.expected_impact: Claude reasoning quality +15-20% when using surfaced memories

ranked_actions.fix: FIX-R2: Elaboration scoring + fragment demotion after consolidation
ranked_actions.rationale: Highest dimensionality (6). Addresses the core Ehlers & Clark pathological mechanism. Directly improves MRR.

ranked_actions.fix: FIX-R3: MMR diversification after cross-encoder reranking
ranked_actions.rationale: Addresses pattern separation failure. Low implementation cost (new layer, ~50 lines). Immediate MRR improvement.

ranked_actions.fix: FIX-R1: Reconsolidation window via activation lability + shadow updates
ranked_actions.rationale: Wires existing orphaned fields (activation, access_history). Medium implementation cost. Long-term accuracy improvement.

ranked_actions.fix: FIX-R4: Temporal distance + intrusion_score markers in retrieval response
ranked_actions.rationale: Low cost (response serialization change). Enables Pinky to reason about memory provenance. Implements Ehlers & Clark 'nowness' dimension.

ranked_actions.fix: Wire orphaned fields (temporal_relevance, access_history) to retrieval scoring
ranked_actions.rationale: Already computed infrastructure. Unknown impact until measured.
Prevents undead memories. Requires careful tuning.
Partially compensated by content-based attribution. Low priority.

sleight: semantic goal reframing for prospective memory
constraint profile definition per cognitive task
claude: feedback source (improved by seeing nowness markers)

boundaries.veld_to_sleight: Temporal markers, intrusion scores, elaboration quality — Pinky reasons about these
boundaries.sleight_to_veld: Constraint profiles, re-elaboration requests, semantic goal embeddings for prospective memory
boundaries.claude_to_veld: Richer remember() calls when Pinky signals important context

cognitive_science_synthesis.core_insight: Veld's proactive_context IS an intrusive recollection system (Berntsen's involuntary autobiographical memory). It surfaces memories without being asked, based on contextual cues. The problem is it implements the MECHANISM without the CONSTRAINTS that keep involuntary memory adaptive.

missing_constraints.veld_status: Partially implemented (recency_weight parameter) but optional and not exposed as temporal marker

missing_constraints.berntsen_function: Selectivity — require high feature overlap between cue and memory

missing_constraints.veld_status: Absent. No MMR, no decorrelation, no semantic deduplication
Absent. No elaboration scoring. Fragments and facts compete equally

missing_constraints.berntsen_function: Mark memories as 'past' vs 'present' — prevent 'nowness' confusion
missing_constraints.veld_status: Absent. Absolute timestamps only. No nowness/pastness markers

missing_constraints.berntsen_function: Update memories based on new context when accessed
missing_constraints.veld_status: Infrastructure exists (activation, access_history) but disconnected from retrieval pipeline

cognitive_science_synthesis.transformation_path: Add constraints progressively: elaboration scoring → fragment demotion → MMR → reconsolidation → temporal markers. This transforms proactive_context from a pathological intrusion system (Ehlers & Clark) into an adaptive involuntary memory system (Berntsen).

expected_aggregate_impact.claude_reasoning_quality: +15-20% when using surfaced memories (temporal markers enable provenance reasoning)
